results.title: Redential: A developer credential that proves what you built
results.content:
Subscribe

Launching today

Redential

# Redential

Launching today

## A developer credential that proves what you built

12 followers

## A developer credential that proves what you built

12 followers

Visit website

Git clients

Your best work is probably under an NDA, so nobody can see it. Nobody trusts CVs anymore, they are so fakeable. Redential reads your git history on your own machine and turns it into a profile of what you actually built. Never your code, and you see exactly what gets shared before it does. Then you defend it live, answering questions about your own work. The result: a credential recruiters can trust more than a CV. The CLI is free and open source.

 Overview
 Reviews
 Alternatives
 Built with
 Team
 More

Free Options [...] ⚖️ Honest by design  
Anything from your own machine can be faked — so we label that evidence as exactly what it is, and never call it verified until it's defended. No inflated claims, ever.  
  
Getting started is free: scan your repos, build your public profile, and run your first live defense. For teams that hire, there's a dashboard and API to request and review defended profiles. Want it for your team? Book a call:   
  
The CLI is fully open source: github.com/redential/redential-cli - if you're technical and you can break the trust model, that's the feedback I want most. I want more contributors to help me improve the evidence and make a stronger credential.  
  
👉 Try it now: npx redential scan or redential.com  
  
Thanks for reading, excited to hear what you think! 🙌 [...] Hey Product Hunt 👋  
  
I'm Juan, founder of Redential.  
  
Here's the problem that made me build this: Nowadays a CV can be faked and polished, a github can be cloned, none of it shows anyone that you really know how to do the job.  
  
So the question became: what can't be faked? The answer: work you actually did and the memory of doing it.  
  
Here's how Redential works:  
  
🔍 Scan your work, locally (Open Source CLI).  
Run 'npx redential scan' on any repo, no account needed. It reads your git history on your own machine and detects what you actually built with: not just "Stripe is installed", but real patterns, like a webhook flow with signature checks and duplicate-payment protection, connected.

The most reliable proxy infrastructure for AI & Data Mining. [...] Report

#### What's great

easy setup (54)great customer support (41)high quality products (54)fast support response (51)simple to use (43)great customer service (37)effective for web scraping (26)stable connection (35)great customer serv (42)real time sentiment tracking and sentiment time tracking (26) [...] Another thing I like is their customer support. They reply fast and actually try to help instead of giving generic answers. Overall, it feels like a reliable service that does what it promises without complications.

#### What needs improvement

more advanced features for power users (12)inclusion of more locations for static isp ips (20)stroger undetectable proxies (12)

One thing that could be improved is adding more locations, especially for static ISP proxies. It would also be nice to have more advanced features for users who need deeper control.

Other than that, maybe some more bonuses or flexible pricing options could make it even better. But overall, the service is already very solid.

results.content:

Started using this for work and found it so easy to use that I've moved all my personal passwords here too. Not having to remember passwords, credit cards or even how I log in across all devices has been a game changer.

#### What's great

intuitive interface (6)synchronization across devices (2)credit card storage (4)

Report

 13 views

Polaris

Polaris

•6 reviews

Way better than last past. More beautiful and with less security incidents. However, the need for a desktop app looks a little too much. It is not very good to get the new passwords. Sometimes, even with the app opened and unlocked, it does not proactively stores the new password.

#### What needs improvement

(E.g. this pw may not have been saved because...; or this pw may have been saved to a personal account...; etc). Otherwise keep on rockin'!

Living in Ireland and dreaming of property investment, I stumbled upon REI LITICS, and honestly, I'm blown away! It's a gem, offering up all the essential insights in a user-friendly package that makes it a cinch to spot trends and slash research time. I'm talking real, valuable metrics that pave the way for savvy decisions. It's a real shame it's not available in Ireland yet—here's hoping they'll bring it to us soon. Hats off to the team for such a stellar platform!
